allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''total:'''', d.get\(''''total''''\)\); print\(''''hasMore:'''', d.get\(''''hasMore''''\)\); print\(''''facets:'''', json.dumps\(d.get\(''''facets''''\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''total:'''', d[''''total'''']\); print\(''''memories:'''', len\(d[''''memories'''']\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''total:'''', d[''''total'''']\); print\(''''titles:'''', [m[''''title''''] for m in d[''''memories'''']]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{m[""memory_file""]} — children: {m[""children""]}''''\) for m in data[''''memories''''] if m.get\(''''children'''',0\) > 0]")
